title: Knowledge Base top-bar menu
description: Schema for config/menu.json. Drives top-level tabs in the MkDocs Material header.

label.description: Display text for the tab or dropdown entry.

url.description: Either a docs-relative path (e.g. 'about.md', 'downloads/index.md') or an absolute URL (https://...). Mutually exclusive with `children` and `external_section`.

external_section.description: Expand this entry by reading the upstream SUMMARY.md of the named external section. Only valid as a child of a dropdown.

children.description: Sub-items shown in a dropdown. When present, this item becomes a dropdown header (no `url`).
